features: Snazaroo Ultimate Party Pack Face Paint Kit gives you the classic set for transforming you into character; This will be fictitious for any occasion, making up to 85 full faces
Easy to follow: A face painting guide that includes designs that can be achieved in 3 easy steps is included, This kit will ensure a stunning transformation every time

Suitable for Sensitive Skin: Snazaroo face paints are specially formulated to be friendly to the most delicate skin and are fragrance free All Snazaroo face paints have been reviewed by an independent professor of dermatology and professional toxicologists
Washable: Snazaroo face paints are all water based; This makes them as easy to get off as they are to put on, Simply remove with soap and warm water; there is no need for scrubbing or harsh removers

Set contains 2ml White, Black, Bright Red, Bright Yellow, Grass Green, Orange, Sky Blue, Dark Brown, Royal Blue, Pale Pink, Sparkle Pink and Sparkle Lilac, 8ml Glitter Gels x1 (colours may vary per pack) together with 2 brushes, 6 sponges and a full colour step-by-step face painting guide.
description: Product Description Add fun and adventure to playtime at home with the Snazaroo Adventure Face Paint Kit. From swashbuckling pirates to animals of the wild, Snazaroo lets their imagination run wild. With 8 skin friendly colours and a step-by-step face painting guide, this pack is classic for parties and other celebrations. Directions Step-by-step instructions Safety Warning Some colours may stain, but any staining will go away and in most cases, you should be able to remove the face paint with some warm water and soap See more
